title: astragalus hornii
intro: Astragalus hornii, also known as Huangqi, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus hornii include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus hornii can be prepared into various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, teas, and decoctions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural defenses.
